result.finding: No embedded language usage detected. The application is a pure Java Spring Boot implementation with no process execution, scripting engines, native library loading, or other embedded language mechanisms.
evidence: No Runtime.getRuntime().exec() or ProcessBuilder calls found in Java source files
No ScriptEngineManager, Nashorn, GraalVM, or GroovyShell usage found
No System.loadLibrary() or JNI/JNA native method declarations found
No groovy, jython, jruby, or rhino dependencies in pom.xml
No .groovy, .js, .py, or .lua script files found in src/main/resources/
No dynamic SQL via Statement.execute() — application uses Spring Data JPA repositories
